description_long: This is a short, robust fence constructed from what appears to be dark metal, featuring a solid rectangular top rail with a series of evenly spaced, blocky protrusions along its upper edge. The fence is supported by two thick, vertical posts on either end, each connected at the base by a horizontal rail for added stability. The overall design is utilitarian and industrial, with no visible decorative elements or embellishments. The top edge of the fence is flat, and the posts have no caps or finials. The structure is compact and sturdy, likely intended to serve as a low barrier or divider in an urban environment such as a park, sidewalk, or parking lot. Its dark, metallic finish gives it a modern, functional appearance.
description: A short, sturdy metal fence with a flat top rail featuring blocky protrusions and thick vertical posts, finished in a dark metallic color. The design is utilitarian and lacks decorative elements.
description_view_0: Front view showing the flat top rail with evenly spaced blocky protrusions and two thick vertical posts connected by a lower rail.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the narrow profile of the fence and the depth of the top rail and posts.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the flat back of the top rail and the supporting lower rail between the posts.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, similar to view 1, showing the thickness of the posts and the protrusions on the top rail.
